reference: How may I help you? Hi, um, I'm here because I, I had this cough for a couple days and now my voice still hasn't recovered. Um, and have you had any fevers or chills? No. Or any, any night sweats? No. And any changes to your weight recently? Um, I've had some weight gain over the past like six months. Okay, well that's great. And about how much? Uh just, maybe like 5, 10 pounds. 5 to 10 pounds, somewhere around there. Okay, well that's good. And um, have you had any nausea or vomiting? No. How about any abdominal pain? Uh no. Any uh, diarrhea? No. Or any urinary problems? No. Have you had any muscle aches or, or joint pains? Uh, no. Okay, and have you had any loss of your taste or sense of smell? No. Okay, um, and any skin changes or rashes? Nope, nothing like that. Okay, and uh, how about anybody at school or, or work, or anything like that that you've been around who's been sick? Okay, um, and so for, if it is a viral infection then, um, it's just supportive kind of management. Um, but it will, it will just take some time for it to come back on its own, a few days to a couple of weeks sometimes.
